art_highlights: Global art market rebounded 4% in 2025 to $59.6B, with U.S. market growing 5% to $26B.
Ultra-high-end segment ($10M+) shows resilience with nearly 40% growth in some sectors.
Auction sales for 2025 grew 9% globally; U.S. auction sales rose 23% to $3.17B.
Market sentiment is cautious: 43% of dealers expect improved sales in 2026, though galleries are adapting to a selective collector base.
Postwar and Contemporary remains the dominant sector despite slight value corrections.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Negative; heavily impacted by geopolitical turmoil.
market_summary.key_drivers: Persian Gulf conflict (Iran war), rising Treasury yields, and persistent inflation concerns.
market_summary.trend: S&P 500 facing longest losing streak in a year; investors abandoning rate-cut bets as energy price spikes drive inflation fears.
